Lionel Messi

Lionel Andrés Messi Cuccittini

Position: FW-MF (AM, right) •  Footed: Left

170cm,  72kg  (5-7, 159lbs)

Born: June 24, 1987 in Rosario, Argentina

Wages   £150,000 Expires June 2026. Via Capology

Citizenship:  Spain
